CREATE TABLE numbers (id INT, value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO numbers (id, value) VALUES (1, random()), (2, random()), (3, random());
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM numbers WHERE value > 0.5;
CREATE TABLE more_numbers AS SELECT id, random() AS random_value FROM numbers;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM more_numbers WHERE random_value BETWEEN 0.2 AND 0.8;
SELECT id, random() AS random_value FROM numbers WHERE random() < 0.5;
CREATE TABLE random_pairs AS SELECT a.id AS a_id, b.id AS b_id FROM numbers a JOIN numbers b ON random() < 0.5;
SELECT a.id, b.id, random() AS random_value FROM numbers a JOIN numbers b ON a.id < b.id ORDER BY random();
SELECT id, random() AS random_value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM numbers WHERE value > random()) AS count_above_random FROM numbers;
